summary: Adds alias notes and consolidates obs latest citation footers for cleaner multi-series output.
highlights: Go toolchain baseline is now go 1.26.3
New reserve alias set <ALIAS> <SERIES_ID> --note "..." support for optional user-authored alias notes
Alias list output now includes a NOTE column and alias get prints notes when present
reserve obs latest table-output citations now collapse to one compact footer line
Multi-source obs latest output uses a deduplicated Sources: line with semicolon-separated providers
Single-source obs latest output preserves the existing Source: label
Alias collision checks now fail closed on transient upstream errors and alias delete resolves the owning config file
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
